pending.body:
finding_summary: `run history` still returns `milestone_id`/`bead_id` as null for milestone-backed projects created through the generic `create_project` path. The canonical project record persists `task_source` (`src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:1292-1300`), but `run_history` derives lineage only from journal events (`src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:1560-1584`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs:347-371`). `create_project` does not copy `input.task_source` into the initial `project_created` event (`src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:302-313`), so the new history fields are wrong whenever the journal lacks the duplicated lineage metadata.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs
- src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs
remediation_hint: Treat `ProjectRecord.task_source` as the source of truth for history lineage, or at minimum inject `task_source` into the initial journal details whenever `create_project` receives it.

finding_summary: Task detail queries now silently drop lineage when the milestone record is missing. `load_task_lineage_detail` converts `MilestoneNotFound` into `None` (`src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:1377-1387`), and the text renderers only print lineage when `task_lineage` is present (`src/cli/project.rs:772-786`, `src/cli/task.rs:149-163`). A milestone-backed task whose milestone directory was deleted or not checked out therefore becomes indistinguishable from a standalone task even though `ProjectRecord.task_source` still contains the milestone/bead IDs.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs
- src/cli/project.rs
- src/cli/task.rs
remediation_hint: Preserve a fallback lineage view from `task_source` (at least milestone_id/bead_id) and surface that the milestone metadata is missing instead of dropping lineage entirely.

finding_summary: The new milestone lineage queries accept unknown bead IDs as successful empty results instead of reporting an invalid lookup. `resolve_bead_plan_details` falls back to `(None, [])` when the bead is absent from the plan (`src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2120-2154`), and both `read_bead_lineage` (`src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2222-2247`) and the no-runs branch of `bead_execution_history` (`src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:2279-2284`) return that fallback. A typo or stale bead ID is therefore indistinguishable from a real bead with no metadata/history.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs
remediation_hint: When the plan loads successfully and the requested bead is not present in it, return a not-found/corrupt-record error rather than an empty lineage view.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 7 -> Plan and Implement
